summary: PaySupplierPage.js full QB-style redesign — all 15 specified frontend features verified PASSING. Left supplier panel, Pay To search dropdown, budget auto-allocation (oldest-due-first), PO table with checkboxes, Pay All Due / Pay All buttons, QB-style summary footer, PIN input, disabled Save & Pay logic, and unused budget notice all working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Minor React console warning: 'In HTML, <tr> cannot be a child of <span>. In HTML, <span> cannot be a child of <tbody>.' — This is caused by the development visual editor (VE) overlay injecting span wrappers. This is NOT a code bug — it comes from the x-ve-dynamic, x-file-name attributes of the dev environment, not from PaySupplierPage.js itself. No fix needed.
Pay All Due correctly filters supplier.pos[] for past due_date before today — only appears when at least 1 PO is overdue. Correct behavior confirmed.
autoAllocate() correctly uses sortedPos() (oldest-due-first) when setting budget. Budget of ₱30,000 for SUPPLIER 1 allocates to the 2 oldest overdue POs first.
Save & Pay button disabled when: (a) totalApplied <= 0, (b) isShort (wallet < totalApplied), (c) !payPin.trim(). All 3 conditions tested and working.
unusedBudget notice shows in both PO table header ('₱X unused — click a PO to apply') AND in summary panel ('Unused Budget ₱X') when budget > totalApplied.
seed_data_creation: No seed data created — used existing supplier data (24 suppliers, SUPPLIER 1 with overdue POs, CapTest Supplier with 1 PO)
context_for_next_testing_agent: PaySupplierPage.js fully redesigned and verified. Key tested: (1) Left panel 24 suppliers with overdue badges (OVR), (2) Pay To search dropdown shows suggestions when typing, (3) Clicking supplier fills Pay To + shows PO table with checkboxes, (4) Checking PO row auto-fills Paying amount, (5) Pay All Due sets budget=total overdue (₱45,000 for SUPPLIER 1 3 overdue POs), (6) Pay All sets budget=total owed (₱545,050), (7) QB summary: POs Selected/Total Owed/Applying/Unused Budget/Remaining Balance, (8) PIN input visible placeholder='PIN / TOTP', (9) Save & Pay disabled without PIN or when wallet short, (10) Unused Budget notice shows in both PO table header and summary panel. Bank/Digital show amber lock icons + 'Admin/TOTP only' text when selected.

left_panel_supplier_list.detail: 24 suppliers, each with vendor name + total owed + OVR badges (4 suppliers have overdue)

click_supplier_fills_pay_to.detail: Clicking AgriTech Supplies Inc fills Pay To with name, PO table with 11 rows appears

pay_to_search_dropdown.detail: Typing 'SUPPLIER' shows 5 dropdown suggestions with vendor name + total owed

method_buttons.detail: All 5 visible: Cash (active green), Check, Bank Transfer, GCash, Maya

fund_source_buttons.detail: Cashier, Safe (no lock), Bank (amber lock), Digital (amber lock). 'Admin/TOTP only' shows when Bank selected

po_table_columns.detail: Columns: PO#, Due, DR#, Status, Orig. Amt, Balance, Paying. Checkboxes present

po_checkbox_fills_paying.detail: Checking PO fills Paying=₱15,000 (full balance), summary updates to POs Selected=1 of 5

pay_all_due_button.detail: Visible for SUPPLIER 1 (3 overdue POs), NOT visible for CapTest Supplier (no overdue). Clicking sets budget=₱45,000

pay_all_button.detail: Always visible when supplier selected. Clicking sets budget=₱545,050 (total all POs)

qb_summary_panel.detail: data-testid='payment-summary' shows: POs Selected, Total Owed (selected), Applying, Unused Budget, Remaining Balance

save_pay_disabled.detail: Disabled when no POs selected (totalApplied=0) AND when wallet is short. Button shows 'Save & Pay ₱545,050.00' text

unused_budget_notice.detail: Budget=₱2000, CapTest 1 PO=₱1478.90 → '₱521.10 unused — click a PO to apply' in table header + 'Unused Budget ₱521.10' in summary
